sub_pixel_system.notes: RTS game with 3D space movement; sub-pixel precision not documented

special_mechanics.name: 3D Space Movement
special_mechanics.description: Ships can be directed to move anywhere in a spherical playable area, bisected by a circular plane. Fully three-dimensional movement rather than two-dimensional plane constraint.

special_mechanics.name: Fleet Formation System
special_mechanics.description: Non-specialized ships can be grouped into formations such as wedges or spheres to provide tactical advantages during combat.

special_mechanics.name: Ship Docking and Refueling
special_mechanics.description: Fighter ships need to dock with support ships or return to the mothership periodically to refuel.

special_mechanics.name: Salvage and Towing
special_mechanics.description: Salvage corvettes can capture enemy ships and tow them to the mothership to become part of the player's fleet.

tier_notes: Tier 2: RTS game with no documented player character physics parameters. Movement mechanics are fleet/ship-based rather than character-based. No gravity, jump, or sub-pixel data applicable. Documentation focuses on strategic gameplay, ship types, and resource management rather than physics parameters.
